title: Immersive Enhanced
description: Pretty much a FPS destroyer but if you got a good enough pc then i definitely  recommend this.
body:
Hello! 
I am the creator of this modpack.
i created this for me but decided other people might like it!
The only problem is it does cost framerate but nothing my pc cant handle.
This Modpack is meant to be immersive and fun so i would really appreciate with feedback.
My discord user is: luhcalmdom
